message: Pilot bundle schema changed to four content pools; legacy BLIND_BOXES four-column view preserved with hanging kept as an empty compatibility bucket.
scene_expansion_items rewritten for 桌面+学习, 海底+潜水, and 公园+野餐 with default-safe scene enrichment objects.
Regression tests now validate four-pool schema, removed candidate pools, compatibility mapping, and blocked pattern filtering.
Required project docs and workflow records synchronized.
